# Roles whose CI matrix entry should include the `lab` variant (3-disk
# mirror rpool) on top of the default `box` (single-disk rpool).
#
# Read by mise-tasks/ci/detect-roles. One role per line; comments + blank
# lines OK. Add roles here when they have prod-shape behaviour that
# genuinely diverges between box and lab (e.g. mdadm-EFI/swap layout,
# multi-disk pool topology). Don't add roles "just to be thorough" — each
# entry doubles that role's matrix cost.

zfsbootmenu
